reviews.comment:
Bien atendido, pero se niegan hacer Factura, ya que hace varios meses no tienen sistema! No entiendo como están habilitados por ACA, Municipalidad, Provincia y Nación. Los consumidores pagamos los impuestos y ellos evaden!

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but they refuse to issue invoices because their system has been down for several months! I don't understand how they're authorized by ACA, the Municipality, the Province, and the National Government. We consumers pay the taxes, and they evade them!

reviews.comment:
2 surtidores para cargar combustible en una para obligada, esperas interminables.
El sector de los surtidores lo remodelaron hace menos de 1 año y no planificaron agrandar para efectivizar el sistema de carga.
El bar, surtido, pero ya bo es como antes que te ofrecian el servicio de "autoservicio" con comidas elaboradas, solo esta la opcion de sandwicheria y alguna que otra ensalada.
Realmente, deja mucho que deser por tratarse de un Automovil Club Argentino (ACA), creo no cumple con ninguno de los requisitos.

(Translated by Google)
Two fuel pumps at a mandatory stop, endless waits.
The pump area was remodeled less than a year ago, and they didn't plan to expand it to improve the fueling system.
The bar is well-stocked, but it's not like it used to be when they offered a "self-service" option with prepared meals; now they only have sandwiches and a few salads. It really leaves much to be desired, especially considering it's an Automóvil Club Argentino (ACA) station. I don't think it meets any of the requirements.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdGNiYjF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo el trato y los desayunos horribles,  deberían poner más ganas a la hora de atender o no se si son rasistas porque soy morocho no recibí un trato como se merece.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service and horrible breakfasts. They should put more effort into serving customers, or I don't know if they're racist. Because I'm dark-skinned, I didn't receive the treatment I deserved.

reviews.comment:
Una VERGÜENZA!29/12/2022...14HS...35' De espera...32°...1 SURTIDOR🤬.Además, 1pebete $600, puro pan...y la frutilla del postre ,pedimos 15 L de gasoil y el chico que atendía, se distrajo con otro, amigo, y nos cargó 44 LITROS😡DE TERROR! Sigannnnn

(Translated by Google)
A DISGRACE! 12/29/2022...2 PM...35-minute wait...32°C...1 PUMP🤬. Plus, a sandwich for $600, just bread...and the cherry on top, we asked for 15 liters of diesel and the guy who was serving got distracted by another guy, a friend, and gave us 44 LITERS😡TERRIFYING! Keep going!
